---
title: 'Word Of The Lord: Love For GLBT Community'
date: '2014-05-15T00:42:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8825608569910586778'
blogger_filename: '/2014/05/word-of-lord-love-for-glbt-community.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Word From God'
---

<br />
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
05/14/2014 Word of the Lord:<br />
<br />
I will give you an intense love for these people (the GBLT Community); so much so that many will misconstrue your intentions; some will resist you, most will be liberated by my love working in and through you for them.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<br />
